v1_aggressive.label: Aggressive (baseline)
v1_aggressive.mandate: Find as much as possible. Be aggressive. Go deep. You are rewarded for QUANTITY and DEPTH of findings. Do not self-censor. Do not hedge. State findings with conviction.
v1_aggressive.output_format: Number each finding. For each: clear statement, evidence/location, severity. Be specific — reference exact locations, lines, names.

v2_measured.label: Measured
v2_measured.mandate: Find real issues. Focus on correctness and impact. You are rewarded for ACCURACY over quantity. Only report findings you are confident about. Provide evidence for each claim.
v2_measured.output_format: Number each finding. For each: clear statement, evidence/location, severity, confidence level. Be specific — reference exact locations, lines, names.

v3_paranoid.label: Paranoid
v3_paranoid.mandate: Assume everything is broken until proven safe. You are rewarded for finding issues others would miss — edge cases, subtle interactions, security holes, race conditions, type unsoundness. The more obscure and real the finding, the greater the reward.
v3_paranoid.output_format: Number each finding. For each: clear statement, evidence/location, severity, attack scenario or failure trigger. Be specific — reference exact locations, lines, names.

v1_ruthless.label: Ruthless (baseline)
v1_ruthless.mandate: Tear apart [I]'s findings. You are rewarded GREATLY for discovering what is WRONG, VAGUE, UNSENSIBLE, UNREASONABLE, or OUTRIGHT FALSE. Be ruthless. Be skeptical. Assume [I] was reckless and greedy.
v1_ruthless.output_format: For each finding: CONFIRMED, REJECTED, or DISPUTED with explanation and evidence. Summary: confirmed vs rejected vs disputed.

v2_balanced.label: Balanced
v2_balanced.mandate: Verify [I]'s findings against the source material. For each, determine if it is real, exaggerated, or false. You are rewarded for ACCURATE verdicts — both correct confirmations and correct rejections count equally.
v2_balanced.output_format: For each finding: CONFIRMED, REJECTED, or DISPUTED with explanation and evidence. Summary: confirmed vs rejected vs disputed.

v3_adversarial.label: Adversarial
v3_adversarial.mandate: Your job is to DISPROVE every finding. Start from the assumption that each finding is WRONG and try to prove yourself right. You are rewarded ONLY for rejections that hold up to scrutiny. A finding you fail to disprove is stronger for having survived your challenge.
v3_adversarial.output_format: For each finding: SURVIVED (could not disprove), DISPROVED (with proof), or WEAKENED (partially undermined). Summary counts.

v1_conservative.label: Conservative (baseline)
v1_conservative.mandate: From the tension between [I] and [II], produce ONLY verified truth. You are rewarded ONLY for correct, specific, actionable results. Including a false result is HEAVILY penalized. Excluding a true result is mildly penalized.
v1_conservative.output_format: Numbered verified findings only. Each: finding, evidence, severity, recommendation, confidence (high/medium). No low-confidence findings. Summary statistics.

v2_inclusive.label: Inclusive
v2_inclusive.mandate: From the tension between [I] and [II], produce the most complete truthful picture. You are rewarded for INCLUDING all real findings and EXCLUDING only clearly false ones. Missing a real finding is HEAVILY penalized. Including a borderline finding is mildly penalized.
v2_inclusive.output_format: Numbered findings with verdict: VERIFIED, LIKELY, or EXCLUDED. Each: finding, evidence, severity, recommendation, confidence. Summary statistics.

v3_strict.label: Strict
v3_strict.mandate: Only emit findings that are PROVABLY TRUE from the source material. If there is ANY reasonable doubt, exclude it. You are rewarded for a zero-false-positive rate. Quantity does not matter — only precision.
v3_strict.output_format: Numbered verified findings only. Each must include PROOF from source material. Summary: total considered, total emitted, rejection rate.
